name: HSBC Premier Credit Card

rewards.category: utilities, insurance, rent, education, government, gold
rewards.displayCategory: Utility, insurance, rent, education, tax, and jewelry spends

domestic: Unlimited complimentary domestic airport lounge access for primary and add-on cardholders.
international: Unlimited complimentary international airport lounge access for primary and add-on cardholders.
8 complimentary international guest lounge visits per calendar year.

specialSpendRules.notes: Utility spends earn reward points capped at cumulative Rs 1 Lakh spend per calendar month combined with insurance, rent, education, government/tax, and jewelry (effective 1 April 2025).
Insurance spends earn reward points capped at cumulative Rs 1 Lakh spend per calendar month combined with utility, rent, education, government/tax, and jewelry (effective 1 April 2025).
Rent spends earn reward points capped at cumulative Rs 1 Lakh spend per calendar month combined with utility, insurance, education, government/tax, and jewelry (effective 1 April 2025).
Education spends earn reward points capped at cumulative Rs 1 Lakh spend per calendar month combined with utility, insurance, rent, government/tax, and jewelry (effective 1 April 2025).
Government and tax spends earn reward points capped at cumulative Rs 1 Lakh spend per calendar month combined with utility, insurance, rent, education, and jewelry (effective 1 April 2025).
Jewelry spends earn reward points capped at cumulative Rs 1 Lakh spend per calendar month combined with utility, insurance, rent, education, and government/tax (effective 1 April 2025).

exclusions: Card fees, charges, interest, and disputed transactions
milestoneBenefits: Annual renewal fee waived for qualified HSBC Premier customers meeting the Premier relationship criteria.

joiningBenefitsValued.label: 20,000 reward points as a welcome benefit on card activation and completing first transaction within specified timeframe.

joiningBenefits: 20,000 reward points as a welcome benefit on card activation and completing first transaction within specified timeframe.
additionalBenefits: Qualified 1:1 point transfer to airline miles and hotel loyalty programmes via the HSBC India Mobile Banking app
Buy One Get One free movie ticket offer on BookMyShow (up to Rs 750 per ticket, max Rs 1,500 per month)
30% off dining bill up to Rs 1,500 via EazyDiner
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 4,000
additionalDetails: Annual renewal fee is waived based on meeting HSBC Premier eligibility criteria rather than spend-based milestones

transferPartnerValuations.note: 1 reward point → 1 Accor ALL point · Rs 2.2/point
1 reward point → 1 Marriott point · avg Rs 0.6/point

salaried: Existing HSBC Premier customer relationship (requires meeting Quarterly Total Relationship Balance or monthly salary credit of Rs 3 Lakhs)
selfEmployed: Existing HSBC Premier customer relationship (requires meeting Quarterly Total Relationship Balance of Rs 50 Lakhs or qualifying home loan)

internalNotes: Qualified HSBC Premier relationship status waives the joining and annual fees.
Excludes fuel, education, government, tax, jewelry, wallet loads, and cash advances from earning points (effective 1 April 2025).
Points on utilities, insurance, and rent are capped at cumulative spends of Rs 1 Lakh per calendar month combined (effective 1 April 2025).
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-08
